records.ety: [L. fr. Gr. <?/, neut. of <?/ self-moving; <?/ self + a root ma, man, to strive, think, cf. <?/ to strive. See Mean, v. i.]

defs: Any thing or being regarded as having the power of spontaneous motion or action.
quotes: So great and admirable an automaton as the world.

defs: A self-moving machine, or one which has its motive power within itself; -- applied chiefly to machines which appear to imitate spontaneously the motions of living beings, such as men, birds, etc.
